summary: Good audience recording captures a hot "Comes‑a‑Time" into an extra‑Phil "Gimme Some Lovin'", delivering solid sound and strong performance.
review: Both reviewers rate this set four stars, praising the crispness of the recording and the energy of the show. Highlights include a scorching rendition of "Comes a Time" that flows straight into a lively "Gimme Some Lovin'" with Phil Lesh stepping forward, while the sound system setup is noted as impressive. No significant flaws are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive 4‑star reviews focus on strong musical moments and a clear, well‑balanced recording; limited number of reviews keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the tape as "Good recording" with no noted dropouts or muffiness; speaker placement (Nak 304s) suggests a well‑projected live sound captured by an audience mic.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows smoothly, highlighted by a hot transition from "Comes a Time" into an energetic "Gimme Some Lovin'" featuring extra Phil.

band_member_comments.Phil: Extra Phil appears on "Gimme Some Lovin'", adding vocal/guitar presence noted by reviewers.
